name: popkit-quality
description: Quality assurance plugin - testing, debugging, security scanning, and multi-perspective assessments

commands.name: assess
commands.description: Multi-perspective self-assessment - anthropic, security, performance, ux, architect, docs

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Project audits - quarterly, yearly, stale issues, duplicates, health, ip-leak

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Systematic debugging with root cause analysis and agent routing diagnostics

commands.name: security
commands.description: Security vulnerability management - scan, list, fix, report
